name: auto-refresh: iterates every source in catalog with fetch_frequency:daily whose last fetched_at is >24h old
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch && for id in google-tsguide owasp-asvs; do echo "2026-05-11T00:00:00Z" > ".claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/$id.txt"; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/auto-refresh-daily.sh" --now 2026-05-13T08:00:00Z --upstream-stub "$PWD/upstream.sh" --report 2>out.txt && grep "google-tsguide" out.txt 1>&2 && grep "owasp-asvs" out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
